name: message-decision-packs
description: Author, validate, and use Message Decision Packs with the local mdp CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Create and route GTM message context.
interface.longDescription: Message Decision Packs helps Codex orchestrate end-to-end MDP workflows, create modular GTM messaging packs, sharpen ICP, brainstorm message angles, codify CTA rules, enforce avoid-rules, extract source evidence, validate with the mdp CLI, and route Clay, Deepline, CSV, or enrichment-style prospect rows into agent-readable copy briefs without turning the pack into a sender, CRM, sequencer, or enrichment tool.
defaultPrompt: Use $mdp-lfg to orchestrate this Message Decision Pack workflow.
Use Message Decision Packs to create an MDP for this ICP.
Build ICP, angles, CTA rules, and avoid-rules for this MDP.
Review this .mdp pack and produce a LinkedIn brief.
